name: Cave City Pickleball
description: Cave City Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Cave City, KY. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Gorin Park
description: Gorin Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Glasgow, KY. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.
